description: Enterprise techniques used by DOWNIISSA, ATT&CK software S9021 (v1.0)
name: DOWNIISSA (S9021)

techniques.comment: [DOWNIISSA](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9021) can decode strings prior to execution.(Citation: Kaspersky LODEINFO OCT 2022)
[DOWNIISSA](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9021) can delete files after download.(Citation: Kaspersky LODEINFO OCT 2022)
[DOWNIISSA](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9021) can download files to the compromised host.(Citation: Kaspersky LODEINFO OCT 2022)
[DOWNIISSA](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9021) can use the `URLDownloadToFileA()` API to download from remote resources.(Citation: Kaspersky LODEINFO OCT 2022)
[DOWNIISSA](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9021) code is base64 encoded and XOR encrypted.(Citation: Kaspersky LODEINFO OCT 2022)
[DOWNIISSA](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9021) can inject shellcode directly into process memory including WINWORD.exe and msiexec.exe.(Citation: Kaspersky LODEINFO OCT 2022)

[DOWNIISSA](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9021) can create an instance of msiexec.exe and inject [LODEINFO](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9020) shellcode into the memory of the process.(Citation: Kaspersky LODEINFO OCT 2022)
